changed_items.question: I'm getting excited about my visit to the music store this weekend. Any tips on what to look for in a new guitar?

items.question: I’m a bit anxious about getting around Tokyo. Do you have any helpful tips?
items.base_answer: Use the JR Yamanote Line from Shinjuku to Shimbashi, then transfer to the Tokyo Metro Ginza Line to Tsukijishijo Station. Travel time is 30-40 minutes, fare is ¥420-450. Use your Suica card, wear comfortable shoes, and visit early morning to avoid crowds.
items.current_answer: Take the JR Yamanote Line from Shinjuku to Shimbashi, transfer to the Tokyo Metro Ginza Line, ride 2 stops to Tsukijishijo Station. Total travel time: 30-40 minutes. Fare: ¥420-450. Use Suica card at gates. Visit early (5-7 AM) for best experience. Wear comfortable shoes. Be mindful of belongings.
